title: aristida subaequans
intro: Aristida subaequans, also known as three-awn grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aristida subaequans include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin infections, among others. The herbal preparations of this plant may include infusion, decoction, or tincture, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
